title: B.Com. (Hons) International Accounting and Finance with ACCA
content: This program offers dual advantages to students by combining a B.Com degree with the professional benefits of the ACCA qualification. Upon successful completion of the B.Com (International Accounting & Finance) program, students will receive a B.Com (International Accounting & Finance) degree from Galgotias University, along with ACCA Affiliate status, provided they qualify all non-exempted papers within the time frame specified by ACCA. The program comprises 13 specialized courses, of which 9 (nine) are exempted and 4 (four) are non-exempted. Students must qualify all 4 non-exempted courses to become an ACCA Affiliate. These exempted papers are integrated into the curriculum itself. Upon successful completion of the professional-level modules (SBL, SBR, and any two from AFM to AAA), students become eligible for ACCA Affiliate status. To obtain full ACCA membership, three years of relevant work experience are required. The program's objective is to support students in achieving the ACCA qualification by integrating its examination framework into the B.Com curriculum. It includes subjects such as International Financial Management, Auditing, Financial Accounting and Reporting, among others. Additionally, the program details the structure and exemptions, registration process, exam entries, fee information, ACCA awards, training for non-exempt papers, study materials, Practical Experience Requirements (PER), and membership details. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities:- 1) B.Com in IAF Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) 50% or above in best four relevant subjects at XII level 01 Apply the knowledge of Accounting and Finance to solve real life business issues. 02 03 Analyze and interpret financial and non-financial information for Business Decision making 04 05 06 07 08 Imbibe professional ethics related to financial management practices. 09 Communicate effectively with business community and with society at large. 10 Explore business problems from an entrepreneurial perspective 01 Graduates will be adaptable to change and demonstrate flexibility in navigating dynamic global business environments, responding effectively to evolving global industry trends and technological advancements in professional and academic courses related to commerce and finance. 02 Graduates will possess the required techniques, skills, and knowledge to attain technical expertise in accounting and finance, tailored to the contemporary global corporate landscape. 03 Graduates will contribute positively to society by applying their business knowledge and skills to address societal challenges, promote sustainable practices, and create value for stakeholders. 01 Graduates will be proficient in accounting principles and practices, including preparation and interpretation of financial statements, compliance with accounting standards, and application of accounting software. 02 Attain globally recognized professional qualifications in International Accounting and Finance, evaluating strategic decision-making abilities that encompass strategy formulation, risk management, and assessment of an organization’s financial resources. 03 Graduates will demonstrate entrepreneurial thinking and innovation, with the ability to identify business opportunities, develop business plans and manage entrepreneurial ventures. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities:- 1) B.Com in IAF Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) 50% or above in best four relevant subjects at XII level
